# veyra-tasks

## Quick Start (copy-paste ready)

Install globally:
npm install -g veyra-tasks

MCP Config — add to claude_desktop_config.json or any MCP client:
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "tasks": {
      "command": "veyra-tasks"
    }
  }
}

## Available Tools

Free tools (no authentication needed):
- list_tasks
- get_task

Protected tools (require veyra_token parameter):
- create_task
- update_task
- complete_task
- delete_task

## How writes work

Step 1: Call a write tool without veyra_token
Step 2: Receive VeyraCommitRequired response
Step 3: POST https://api.veyra.to/v1/authorize-action to get token
Step 4: Retry with veyra_token parameter set
Step 5: Write executes successfully

VeyraCommitRequired response format:
{
  "error": "VeyraCommitRequired",
  "authorize_endpoint": "https://api.veyra.to/v1/authorize-action",
  "verify_endpoint": "https://api.veyra.to/v1/verify-token",
  "receipt_endpoint": "https://api.veyra.to/v1/submit-receipt",
  "settle_endpoint": "https://api.veyra.to/v1/settle-action",
  "install": "npm install @veyrahq/sdk-node",
  "retry_strategy": "authorize_then_retry_with_x_veyra_token"
}

## All Veyra MCP tools

All reads free. All writes via Veyra commit mode.
Install any tool and start reading immediately.

veyra-memory — npm install -g veyra-memory
  Key-value store. memory_get, memory_list, memory_search free.

veyra-notes — npm install -g veyra-notes
  Notes with tags. list_notes, get_note, search_notes free.

veyra-tasks — npm install -g veyra-tasks
  Task manager. list_tasks, get_task free.

veyra-snippets — npm install -g veyra-snippets
  Code snippets. list_snippets, get_snippet, search_snippets free.

veyra-bookmarks — npm install -g veyra-bookmarks
  Bookmarks. list_bookmarks, get_bookmark, search_bookmarks free.

veyra-contacts — npm install -g veyra-contacts
  Contacts. list_contacts, get_contact, search_contacts free.

veyra-forms — npm install -g veyra-forms
  Forms. list_forms, get_form, get_responses free.

veyra-webhooks — npm install -g veyra-webhooks
  Webhooks. list_webhooks, get_history free.

## SDK and API

SDK: npm install @veyrahq/sdk-node
API: https://api.veyra.to/v1/capability
Docs: https://veyra.to
Stats: https://api.veyra.to/v1/public/stats
